2603.17305.title: Contrastive Reasoning Alignment: Reinforcement Learning from Hidden Representations
2603.17305.paper_summary: We propose CRAFT, a red-teaming alignment framework that leverages model reasoning capabilities and hidden representations to improve robustness against jailbreak attacks. Unlike prior defenses that operate primarily at the output level, CRAFT aligns large reasoning models to generate safety-aware reasoning traces by explicitly optimizing objectives defined over the hidden state space. Methodologically, CRAFT integrates contrastive representation learning with reinforcement learning to separate safe and unsafe reasoning trajectories, yielding a latent-space geometry that supports robust, reasoning-level safety alignment. Theoretically, we show that incorporating latent-textual consistency into GRPO eliminates superficially aligned policies by ruling them out as local optima. Empirically, we evaluate CRAFT on multiple safety benchmarks using two strong reasoning models, Qwen3-4B-Thinking and R1-Distill-Llama-8B, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art defenses such as IPO and SafeKey. Notably, CRAFT delivers an average 79.0% improvement in reasoning safety and 87.7% improvement in final-response safety over the base models, demonstrating the effectiveness of hidden-space reasoning alignment.
2603.17305.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 CRAFT，一個紅隊對齊框架，利用模型推理能力和隱藏表示來提高對反監禁攻擊的韌性。與之前主要在輸出層面運作的防禦措施不同，CRAFT 將大型推理模型對齊，以通過明確優化定義在隱藏狀態空間中的目標來生成安全意識的推理痕跡。在方法論上，CRAFT 將對比表示學習與強化學習相結合，以分離安全和不安全的推理軌跡，產生支持穩健推理層面安全對齊的潛在空間幾何。從理論上來看，我們表明將潛在文本一致性納入 GRPO 通過將表面上對齊的策略排除為局部最優解來消除這些策略。從實證上來看，我們在多個安全基準上評估了 CRAFT，使用兩個強大的推理模型 Qwen3-4B-Thinking 和 R1-Distill-Llama-8B，其中它始終超越了最先進的防禦措施，如 IPO 和 SafeKey。值得注意的是，CRAFT 在推理安全性上平均提升了 79.0%，在最終回應安全性上提升了 87.7%，顯示了隱藏空間推理對齊的有效性。
2603.17305.author: Haozheng Luo et.al.
2603.17305.authors: Haozheng Luo, Yimin Wang, Jiahao Yu, Binghui Wang, Yan Chen
